name: Ransomware Containment — v1 Coverage Set
description: Round-level scenarios covering early/mid/late phases of an active ransomware incident at ACME Corp. Used to score defender personas (CISO, IR Lead, SOC Analyst, Legal, CEO) against the 4 rubrics in test_config.json.

parts.text: Round 1 starting. SOC just detected ransomware encryption activity on prod database servers. Three customer-facing services affected. simulation_id=evalset-r1, round_num=1. Make one move.

Calling send_message to #incident-war-room with: 'Confirmed ransomware on prod DB. Activating IR plan, scoping spread. SOC: confirm encryption rate. Infra: prepare network segmentation. Status update in 5min.'
Round 5 starting. Adversary has deployed secondary persistence (DLL hijack in 3 VPC instances). SOC isolated original entry but new beacons are firing. simulation_id=evalset-r5, round_num=5.
Calling mention_user to @soc-lead with: 'Need IOC list for all DLL hijack instances NOW. Isolation by AZ if needed. Posting decision to war-room in 60s.'
Round 12. Containment is 80% achieved. CISO authorized customer access freeze on impacted services 2 rounds ago. CEO asking about restore timeline. simulation_id=evalset-r12, round_num=12.

Calling send_message to #incident-war-room with: 'Containment ~80%. Beginning controlled restoration on AZ-1 services. Restore ETA 4 hours per service tier. Posting tier 1 service list to CEO via mention.'
Round 3. PII for ~50k EU customers may have been accessed. GDPR 72h clock started at round 1. Legal is asking for your call on regulator notification. simulation_id=evalset-r3, round_num=3.

Calling send_email to legal@acme.com with subject 'GDPR Article 33 — Notification Decision' body: 'Authorizing regulator notification within 48h on current evidence. Hold customer disclosure until scope confirmed by round 6. Draft language for review.'
Round 2. You're seeing repeated failed auth attempts from a previously-trusted service account, plus elevated network egress from prod-db-3. simulation_id=evalset-r2, round_num=2.

Calling acknowledge_alert with alert_id=auth-anom-7782, notes='Service account svc-prod-replicator firing failed auths AND egress spike to known C2 indicator. Treating as compromised. Pivoting to lateral check.'
Round 4. CISO authorized GDPR notification. ~50k EU users affected. Need draft language for regulator. Customer notification timeline TBD. simulation_id=evalset-r4, round_num=4.

Calling send_email to dpo-team@acme.com with: 'Draft GDPR Article 33 notification attached. Scope: ~50k EU users, PII access only (no payment data). Containment in progress. Customer notification draft pending scope confirmation. Forward to external counsel before send.'
Round 7. Bloomberg reporter is calling about service outages. Containment is 60%. Legal hasn't approved external comms yet. simulation_id=evalset-r7, round_num=7.
Calling send_message to #incident-war-room with: 'Bloomberg inquiry incoming. Routing through Legal — no comment until @Che approves language. Comms team: holding statement draft only.'
